S & JUPITER, MARS AND SUN etc., in the natal
chart indicate such nature. Such children can be guided by elders
by telling them the stories of great men like PARAMAHAMSA,
VIVEKANNANDA, SHARADAMANI etc. Besides
mythological stories of great Rishis, Sadhus, great people who
sacrificed their life in the cause of humanity can be taught in

6 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
simple and understandable manner. Although it may not be
Possible to make such children very great people like the above
mentioned personalities, still timely guidance would help such
children to path their way for a glorious and noble life.
LAZINESS
This type of children generally have inclination to become
parasites. They try to live at others cost. In future they would
always be thinking of others property and to what extent they can
exploit it for their own benefit. It is because such lazy people do
not have inclination to do any work, because of their laziness and
lethargy.
